headline: Australian Design Startup Canva Avoiding Tech-Sector Layoffs
summary: The design-software developer’s profitability has helped it avoid the large-scale layoffs seen at other tech companies as it builds toward a U.S. stock-market listing, its CEO said.

headline: Avoid these common small business tax mistakes
summary: Block Advisors Strategy and Small Business Program Manager, Latasha Randle, chats with Host, Elizabeth Gore, about how self-employed entrepreneurs can simplify taxes, retirement, and healthcare planning. Randle shares practical advice on staying organized year-round, maximizing deductions, and building long-term financial security through proactive planning.

headline: Assessing Block’s (SQ) Valuation After GOLFTEC Adopts Square’s Platform Across 200 US Locations
summary: Block (XYZ) is back in focus after GOLFTEC chose Square to run payments and commerce across more than 200 US locations. This highlights how Block’s ecosystem can support complex, tech heavy service businesses. See our latest analysis for Block. Recent trading reflects this renewed interest, with a 1 month share price return of 13.57% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 26.46%. However, the 5 year total shareholder return of a 72.29% decline shows longer term holders have had a tougher...
